plugin.itam.localization.key.name: ITAM Logs
plugin.itam.tab.title: IT Asset Management Logs
plugin.itam.hint.scan: Point the camera at the device barcode.
plugin.itam.notfound.logs: No ITAM log entries found. Try a different filter.
plugin.itam.modal.add.entry.title: Add ITAM Log Entry
plugin.itam.placeholder.device.search: Search by device ID, serial, or name
Leave blank or enter N/A for unassigned stock
plugin.itam.hint.date.locked: Locked to the existing owner's date. Change the owner to set a new date.
plugin.itam.hint.pictures.limit: At least 1, up to 5 images, 5MB each (JPEG, PNG, WebP)
plugin.itam.telemetry.title: Live Device Telemetry
plugin.itam.error.invalid.device: Select a valid device from the list
plugin.itam.error.device.not.found: No device matches the scanned number
plugin.itam.error.scan.unsupported: Barcode scanning isn't supported by this browser. Use Chrome, Edge, or Android, or enter the number manually.
plugin.itam.error.scan.camera: Couldn't access the camera. Grant camera permission and open the panel over HTTPS.
plugin.itam.error.too.many.pictures: A maximum of 5 pictures is allowed
plugin.itam.error.picture.type: Only JPEG, PNG, or WebP images are allowed
plugin.itam.error.picture.size: Each picture must be 5MB or smaller
